title: ArcSight
description: The OpenCTI ArcSight connector synchronises indicators of compromise from OpenCTI to an ArcSight ESM Active List in real time. Leveraging OpenCTI live streams, IPv4/IPv6 addresses, domain names, URLs and file hashes are added to (and removed from) a configurable Active List through the ESM Service Layer REST API, so correlation rules can match events against the threat intelligence curated in OpenCTI.
short_description: Sync IOCs from OpenCTI to an ArcSight ESM Active List in real time.
